Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Unholy Progression
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +13% (augmented)
Pack Size: +16% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +43% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +13% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +85% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 82
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Destructive" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 231(200-240)% increased Critical Hit Chance
Monsters have +23(21-25)% Critical Damage Bonus
{ Prefix Modifier "Venomous" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 33(27-33)% chance to Poison on Hit
{ Prefix Modifier "Painful" (Tier: 1) }
15(15-19)% increased Monster Damage
{ Suffix Modifier "of Buffering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters gain 23(12-25)% of maximum Life as Extra maximum Energy Shield
{ Suffix Modifier "of the Unwavering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 78(70-79)% increased Ailment Threshold
Monsters have 65(60-69)% increased Stun Threshold
{ Suffix Modifier "of Enduring" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters are Armoured
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
